ConciseSummary: Testing the CTLv3 template rendering pipeline
OverviewDetails: This card is created by the CTLv3 Sustaining regression test suite to verify that the full rendering pipeline works end-to-end.
PrerequisitesForUnderstanding: CTLv3 template library, Z2K Templates plugin, Command Queue
FurtherDetails: If this card appears correctly rendered, Feature 002 has passed.
